# halfpap.io

> The personal web hub of Henning Halfpap — self-hosted, static, and
> agent-native. A small, growing distributor of independent projects, each on its
> own subdomain.
>
> Slogan: Made with AI. Made for humans and agents alike.

## Modules

- **Visitenkarte** — https://henning.halfpap.io
  Who Henning is and what he has built — links, not claims.
  Profile core: https://henning.halfpap.io/llms.txt
- **Wetterstation** — https://wetter.halfpap.io
  Live weather data from a self-hosted homelab.
- **Cádiz-Countdown** — https://cadiz.halfpap.io
  A split-flap countdown web module.

## About this site

Static HTML/CSS served by Caddy, no JavaScript, no cookies, no trackers,
self-hosted fonts. The delivered HTML is the content — readable by humans and
agents alike. TLS terminates at a Cloudflare Tunnel.

## Contact

See the Visitenkarte: https://henning.halfpap.io
